historical_odds_table.data_source: Authentic bookmaker odds from CSV dataset
historical_odds_table.bookmaker_count: 12+ real bookmakers (B365, BW, IW, LB, PS, WH, etc.)
use_cases: Historical consensus generation with real market data
Long-term model training on authentic odds
True head-to-head and league historical priors
Seasonal pattern detection with multi-year cycles

odds_consensus_table.data_source: The Odds API + synthetic for development

integration_strategy.training_phase: Use historical_odds for base model training and priors
integration_strategy.prediction_phase: Combine historical context + current market from odds_consensus
integration_strategy.feature_engineering: Historical priors + current market logits + structural features
integration_strategy.model_architecture: Hybrid: historical baselines + current market residuals

competitive_advantages.depth: 40 years vs typical 2-3 years of market data
competitive_advantages.authenticity: Real bookmaker consensus vs synthetic approximation
competitive_advantages.scale: Massive training dataset with authentic market behavior
competitive_advantages.calibration: Decades of true market outcomes for superior calibration
competitive_advantages.market_evolution: Track how odds accuracy evolved over time

tasks: Implement robust date parsing for mixed formats
Train base models on historical odds data
Create historical prior features (H2H, league context)
Integrate current odds_consensus for recent matches
Integrate with The Odds API for current data

success_metrics.data_quality: Historical odds processing with >95% success rate
success_metrics.model_performance: LogLoss improvement over current synthetic baseline
